channel.title: Reviews — ErgoDesk Guide on ErgoDesk Guide

item.title: BenQ ScreenBar Review — Is It Worth the Hype?
item.description: A full review of the BenQ ScreenBar LED monitor light. Does it actually help with eye strain? Is it worth £180?

item.title: FlexiSpot E7 Review — The Best Standing Desk?
item.description: A full, honest review of the FlexiSpot E7 standing desk. Build quality, stability, motor performance, and value.
